principles: Density is King: Data must be scannable instantly.
Tracing Beams: Active states glow like laser scanners.
No rounded corners > 4px: This is a tool, not a toy.
The 'Control Room' Grid: Asymmetrical, functional, locked-in.

usage_rules.headings: Uppercase, tracking-widest, font-bold. Use for section titles and KPI labels.
usage_rules.body: High legibility. Use for standard text and form labels.
usage_rules.data: Use for ASINs, IDs, Prices, and Status codes. Tabular nums are mandatory.

layout.spacing_system: Tailwind Scale (p-1 to p-64). Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside containers.

grid_system.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4. Hero KPI spans 2 cols.
grid_system.forms: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6. Inputs are full width.

containers.card: bg-[#13161B] border border-[#2A2F3A] rounded-[2px] shadow-none hover:border-[#FF9900]/50 transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF9900] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#FFAD33] rounded-[2px] h-10 px-6 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,153,0,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2A2F3A] text-[#E6E6E6] hover:bg-[#2A2F3A] rounded-[2px] h-10 px-6

inputs.default: bg-[#0F1115] border border-[#2A2F3A] text-[#E6E6E6] rounded-[2px] focus:border-[#FF9900] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF9900] placeholder:text-[#475569] h-10

status_badge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

tables.header: bg-[#1A1D24] text-[#94A3B8] uppercase text-xs font-bold tracking-wider border-b border-[#2A2F3A]

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

effects.tracing_beam: relative overflow-hidden after:content-[''] after:absolute after:inset-0 after:border after:border-[#FF9900] after:opacity-0 hover:after:opacity-100 after:transition-opacity

motion.list_stagger: Use framer-motion staggerChildren: 0.05 for table rows

login_background.description: Dark warehouse exterior with sign, sets the industrial mood

empty_state.description: Abstract data lines for empty states or loading screens

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all numbers and IDs.
2. THEME: Force dark mode class on the html element. There is no light mode.
3. LAYOUT: Use the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard. It must look dense.
4. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'card' and 'input' styles defined above. Remove rounded-xl, use rounded-[2px].
5. LANGUAGE: All UI text must be in Russian. Code variables remain in English.
6. LOGIN: Use the 'login_background' image with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80) so the form pops.
7. TABLES: This is the most important part. Make them dense (py-2). Use sticky headers.
8. STATUS: Use the defined color mapping for statuses. They must be instantly recognizable.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, only for subtle glows.
All interactive elements must have data-testid.
Input fields must be clearly defined with borders, no 'ghost' inputs unless necessary.
